items.title: Gemini 3 Pro: the frontier of vision AI
items.author: blog.google
items.snippet: Google has been actively releasing updates across its Gemini AI model family in early 2026. The most significant recent announcement is Gemini 3.1 Pro, released in February 2026, which brings upgraded core intelligence with improved reasoning capabilities and higher benchmark scores on complex problem-solving tasks. It is available via the Gemini app, Gemini API, Vertex AI, and NotebookLM (for Pro/Ultra subscribers). Google also released Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite, positioned as the most cost-effecti

items.title: Bring state-of-the-art agentic skills to the edge with Gemma 4 - Google Developers Blog
items.author: developers.googleblog.com
items.snippet: In early April 2026, Google DeepMind's most prominent announcement was the launch of Gemma 4 (announced around April 2, 2026), a family of open-source on-device AI models released under Apache 2.0. Gemma 4 supports over 140 languages, enables multi-step agentic workflows running entirely on-device without specialized fine-tuning, and introduces Agent Skills for autonomous AI use cases including offline code generation and audio-visual processing. This was widely shared across @GoogleDeepMind soc

items.title: Full-Stack Vibe Coding: Building Production-Ready Apps with AI Studio, Stitch & Antigravity
items.author: medium.com
items.snippet: Google AI Studio has emerged as a powerful 'vibe coding' platform for building full-stack applications from plain English prompts. Launched as a major update in early 2026, the platform allows users to describe what they want and have the AI generate a production-ready application complete with backend, database, authentication, and deployment — all without manual configuration. The stack integrates Google AI Studio for code generation, the Antigravity coding agent as an autonomous project manag

items.title: Migrate from Gemini 3 Pro Preview to Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview
items.author: discuss.ai.google.dev
items.snippet: The Gemini API has seen significant updates in early 2026. Google launched the Gemini 3 series, starting with gemini-3-pro-preview (a state-of-the-art reasoning and multimodal model with agentic and coding capabilities), followed by Gemini 3.1 Pro — achieving 77.1% on ARC-AGI-2 — and Gemini 3.1 Flash Live Preview for real-time audio-to-audio dialogue. Gemma 4 open models (26B and 31B variants) were also released and are accessible via the Gemini API and AI Studio. New capabilities include Comput

items.title: How a Gemma Model Helped Discover a New Potential Cancer Therapy Pathway — Google DeepMind
items.author: deepmind.google
items.snippet: Google DeepMind has been prolific in early 2026, with several high-impact research papers published across AI, biology, and computational theory. The most prominent recent work is AlphaEvolve, an LLM-powered evolutionary coding agent that autonomously redesigns game-theory algorithms for multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). Applied to frameworks like Counterfactual Regret Minimization (CFR) and Policy Space Response Oracles (PSRO), AlphaEvolve discovered new algorithm variants that outperf

items.title: What Google Cloud announced in AI this month – and how it helps you | Google Cloud Blog
items.author: cloud.google.com
items.snippet:
Google Cloud has made several significant AI and Gemini announcements in early 2026. The headline release is Gemini 3.1 Pro, launched in preview on Vertex AI and Gemini Enterprise in February 2026, offering noticeably improved reasoning and complex problem-solving capabilities over its predecessor. Alongside it, Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite was introduced as the fastest and most cost-efficient model in the Gemini 3 series, targeting high-volume developer workloads at scale.

items.title: Releases · google-gemini/cookbook
items.author: github.com
items.snippet: The google-gemini GitHub organization has been actively releasing new models and developer tools in early 2026. Most notably, Google released Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview on February 19, 2026, available via the Google AI Studio API under the model ID `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`. The currently active stable models include `gemini-2.5-pro` and `gemini-2.5-flash`. The `google-gemini/gemini-cli` repository saw documentation release note updates in January 2026, reflecting continued investment in developer to

items.title: Image generation API - Vertex AI
items.author: docs.cloud.google.com
items.snippet: Imagen 4 is Google's latest high-performance image generation model available through both the Gemini API and Vertex AI. The model offers sophisticated creative control, photorealistic output, and supports text-to-image generation, image editing via masking, and image upscaling. It is available in three variants: standard Generation (imagen-4.0-generate-001), Fast Generation for lower latency, and Ultra Generation for highest quality with better prompt adherence. The API supports five distinct a

items.title: Genkit - Open-source AI framework by Google in JavaScript, Go and Python
items.author: firebase.google.com
items.snippet: Genkit is an open-source AI framework built and maintained by Google/Firebase for building production-ready AI-powered applications in JavaScript, Go, and Python. It provides a unified, code-centric API for text generation, structured output, streaming, tool calling, and agentic workflows. The framework includes a local developer UI (accessible at localhost:4000) and CLI for testing, debugging, and iterating on AI features, along with built-in observability and evaluation tooling.
